task.title: Kafka Event Publishing
task.description: Integrate Kafka producer to publish notification events for downstream processing

implementation.details:
1. Add rdkafka crate for Kafka integration
2. Configure Kafka producer with proper serialization
3. Publish events to notifications.created topic
4. Handle Kafka connection failures gracefully
5. Add producer metrics

task.acceptance_criteria: Notification submissions trigger Kafka events, events visible in Kafka topic, service handles Kafka downtime gracefully
